vocab.meaning: hành trình tìm lại những ký ức đẹp trong quá khứ
vocab.example: Talking about my stamp collection is truly a walk down memory lane, reminding me of my carefree school days.
I was hooked on playing the piano from the word go, and I’ve never looked back since.

vocab.meaning: trở thành bản năng/thói quen ăn sâu vào máu
vocab.example: Painting has become second nature to me because I’ve been doing it since I could first hold a brush.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu học hỏi/tích lũy kinh nghiệm từ khi còn rất nhỏ
vocab.example: I actually cut my teeth on basic coding when I was just ten years old, thanks to my father's old computer.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn với thời gian (vẫn được duy trì/yêu thích)
vocab.example: My passion for football has stood the test of time, even as my other interests have faded away.

vocab.meaning: học được điều gì đó từ khi còn tấm bé
vocab.example: I learned the art of gardening at my mother's knee, and it remains my favorite hobby to this day.

vocab.word: take a leaf out of someone’s book
vocab.meaning: noi gương ai đó (áp dụng cho việc bắt đầu sở thích)
vocab.example: I took a leaf out of my brother's book and started playing chess when I was six.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm/mê mẩn vào điều gì đó
vocab.example: Since I was a child, I've always loved to lose myself in a good book for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: ngấm vào máu/di truyền trong gia đình
vocab.example: Photography is in my blood; my grandfather was a professional, and I've had a camera in my hand since I was a toddler.

vocab.meaning: khơi lại một đam mê cũ (phù hợp nếu bạn bỏ một thời gian rồi quay lại)
vocab.example: After a long break during university, I’ve recently rekindled my old flame for swimming.
